roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: 3056 PTR-PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PD/WIAPTR/X: STIPULATE TO PROBABLE CAUSE,/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THEFOLLOWING REASON:ARRAIGNED ON NEW PETITITION    /
/CAL: 3056 PTR-PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08 & TO JOIN CURRENT PETITION IN DEPT 31/DOP/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE COURT FINDS GOOD LEGAL CAUSE TO VACATE THE PREVIOUS SENTENCE OF 30-27-14, AND RE-SENTENCES THE PAROLEE AS FOLLOWS:/3000REIN/PAJ:92 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  46  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE ON 3-11-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIMELOSS,COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING:1,  UPON RELEASE FROM CUSTODY, CLIENT MUST GO TO THE PAROLE OFFICE ANDMEETWITH AGENT MATA TO SIGN SOME DOCUMENTS, GET ON HIS GPS MONITOR AND OBTAIN ACHECK FOR THE DAHLIA HOTEL,2,  CLIENT MUST MEET WITH KATHERINE MCGUIRE(SOCIAL WORKER) ON FRIDAY AT 9 A,M, AT THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICER AND FOLLOW HER INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE SPECIAL HOUSING VOUCHER,3,  CLIENT MUST ATTEND PAROLE COURT EVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE,4,  CLIENTMUST ABIDE BY ALL OF HIS PAROLE CONDITIONS,/X:THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FORPROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS OF VOUCHER HOUSING,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:120 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  11  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #4 - ABSCONDING, FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE AND REINSTATES PAROLEON 03-11-14 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLEUPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/BWDNC/NB/CONTD TO JOIN NEW PETITION/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/FTA/BW/BWI/OREVKD/   /NB/BWNUM:1ST/
